name: Sidebar-Navigation
prompt: Baue mir eine Seiten-Navigation bestehend aus Gruppen und Navigationseinträgen mit Icons und Text als Liste
code:
// Tokens
$nav.bg: #0f0f0f
$nav.item.bg: transparent
$nav.item.active.bg: #1a1a1a
$nav.group.col: #666
$nav.item.col: #888
$nav.item.active.col: white

// Components
NavGroup: gap 4, margin 0 0 16 0
  GroupLabel: fs 11, col $nav.group, uppercase, weight 500, pad 0 12, margin 0 0 4 0

NavItem: hor, gap 10, pad 10 12, rad 6, bg $nav.item, col $nav.item, cursor pointer
  ItemIcon: is 18, ic #666
  ItemText: fs 13
  hover:
    bg #1a1a1a
    col white
  active:
    bg $nav.item.active
    col $nav.item.active
    ItemIcon ic #2563eb

// Layout
Frame w 220, h full, bg $nav, pad 12, gap 4

  NavGroup
    GroupLabel "Dashboard"
    NavItem active
      ItemIcon
        Icon "layout-dashboard"
      ItemText "Übersicht"
    NavItem
      ItemIcon
        Icon "bar-chart-2"
      ItemText "Analytics"
    NavItem
      ItemIcon
        Icon "activity"
      ItemText "Berichte"

  NavGroup
    GroupLabel "Verwaltung"
    NavItem
      ItemIcon
        Icon "users"
      ItemText "Benutzer"
    NavItem
      ItemIcon
        Icon "folder"
      ItemText "Projekte"
    NavItem
      ItemIcon
        Icon "file-text"
      ItemText "Dokumente"

  NavGroup
    GroupLabel "Einstellungen"
    NavItem
      ItemIcon
        Icon "settings"
      ItemText "Allgemein"
    NavItem
      ItemIcon
        Icon "shield"
      ItemText "Sicherheit"
    NavItem
      ItemIcon
        Icon "bell"
      ItemText "Benachrichtigungen"
raw_output:

name: Login-Formular
prompt: Erstelle ein dunkles Login-Formular mit E-Mail und Passwort Feldern, einem Anmelden Button und einem Passwort vergessen Link
code:
Frame w 360, bg #111, pad 32, rad 16, gap 24

  // Header
  Frame gap 8, center
    Text "Willkommen zurück", col white, fs 24, weight bold
    Text "Melde dich mit deinem Konto an", col #888, fs 14

  // Form Fields
  Frame gap 16

    // E-Mail
    Frame gap 6
      Text "E-Mail", col #888, fs 12
      Input placeholder "email@example.com", type email
        bg #1a1a1a, bor 1, boc #333, col white, pad 14, rad 8, w full
        focus:
          boc #2563eb

    // Passwort
    Frame gap 6
      Frame hor, spread
        Text "Passwort", col #888, fs 12
        Text "Passwort vergessen?", col #2563eb, fs 12, cursor pointer
          hover:
            underline
      Input placeholder "••••••••", type password
        bg #1a1a1a, bor 1, boc #333, col white, pad 14, rad 8, w full
        focus:
          boc #2563eb

  // Submit Button
  Button "Anmelden", bg #2563eb, col white, pad 14, rad 8, w full, weight 500, cursor pointer
    hover:
      bg #3b82f6

  // Footer
  Frame hor, center, gap 6
    Text "Noch kein Konto?", col #888, fs 13
    Text "Registrieren", col #2563eb, fs 13, cursor pointer
      hover:
        underline
raw_output:
```mirror
Frame w 360, bg #111, pad 32, rad 16, gap 24

  // Header
  Frame gap 8, center
    Text "Willkommen zurück", col white, fs 24, weight bold
    Text "Melde dich mit deinem Konto an", col #888, fs 14

  // Form Fields
  Frame gap 16

    // E-Mail
    Frame gap 6
      Text "E-Mail", col #888, fs 12
      Input placeholder "email@example.com", type email
        bg #1a1a1a, bor 1, boc #333, col white, pad 14, rad 8, w full
        focus:
          boc #2563eb

    // Passwort
    Frame gap 6
      Frame hor, spread
        Text "Passwort", col #888, fs 12
        Text "Passwort vergessen?", col #2563eb, fs 12, cursor pointer
          hover:
            underline
      Input placeholder "••••••••", type password
        bg #1a1a1a, bor 1, boc #333, col white, pad 14, rad 8, w full
        focus:
          boc #2563eb

  // Submit Button
  Button "Anmelden", bg #2563eb, col white, pad 14, rad 8, w full, weight 500, cursor pointer
    hover:
      bg #3b82f6

  // Footer
  Frame hor, center, gap 6
    Text "Noch kein Konto?", col #888, fs 13
    Text "Registrieren", col #2563eb, fs 13, cursor pointer
      hover:
        underline
```

name: Interaktive Cards
prompt: Erstelle drei Projekt-Cards die man anklicken kann. Die angeklickte Card soll hervorgehoben sein (exclusive). Jede Card hat Titel und Beschreibung.
code:
ProjectCard: bg #1a1a1a, pad 20, rad 12, gap 8, cursor pointer, bor 2, boc transparent
  Title: col white, fs 16, weight 600
  Desc: col #888, fs 14
  selected:
    boc #2563eb
    bg #1a1a2e
  hover:
    bg #252525
  onclick: exclusive()

Frame gap 12
  ProjectCard
    Title "Website Redesign"
    Desc "Komplette Überarbeitung der Firmenwebsite"
  ProjectCard selected
    Title "Mobile App"
    Desc "Native App für iOS und Android"
  ProjectCard
    Title "Dashboard"
    Desc "Analytics Dashboard für das Marketing-Team"
raw_output:
```mirror
ProjectCard: bg #1a1a1a, pad 20, rad 12, gap 8, cursor pointer, bor 2, boc transparent
  Title: col white, fs 16, weight 600
  Desc: col #888, fs 14
  selected:
    boc #2563eb
    bg #1a1a2e
  hover:
    bg #252525
  onclick: exclusive()

Frame gap 12
  ProjectCard
    Title "Website Redesign"
    Desc "Komplette Überarbeitung der Firmenwebsite"
  ProjectCard selected
    Title "Mobile App"
    Desc "Native App für iOS und Android"
  ProjectCard
    Title "Dashboard"
    Desc "Analytics Dashboard für das Marketing-Team"
```

name: Dashboard Stats
prompt: Erstelle eine Zeile mit 4 Statistik-Cards für ein Dashboard. Jede Card hat ein Icon, einen Wert und ein Label.
code:
Frame hor, gap 16

  StatCard: bg #1a1a1a, rad 12, pad 20, gap 12, w 180
    IconBox: w 44, h 44, rad 10, center
    Value: col white, fs 28, weight bold
    Label: col #888, fs 13

  StatCard
    IconBox bg #2563eb22
      Icon "users", ic #2563eb, is 22
    Value "1,234"
    Label "Total Users"

  StatCard
    IconBox bg #10b98122
      Icon "dollar-sign", ic #10b981, is 22
    Value "$12.4k"
    Label "Revenue"

  StatCard
    IconBox bg #f59e0b22
      Icon "shopping-cart", ic #f59e0b, is 22
    Value "456"
    Label "Orders"

  StatCard
    IconBox bg #8b5cf622
      Icon "trending-up", ic #8b5cf6, is 22
    Value "+12%"
    Label "Growth"
raw_output:
```mirror
Frame hor, gap 16

  StatCard: bg #1a1a1a, rad 12, pad 20, gap 12, w 180
    IconBox: w 44, h 44, rad 10, center
    Value: col white, fs 28, weight bold
    Label: col #888, fs 13

  StatCard
    IconBox bg #2563eb22
      Icon "users", ic #2563eb, is 22
    Value "1,234"
    Label "Total Users"

  StatCard
    IconBox bg #10b98122
      Icon "dollar-sign", ic #10b981, is 22
    Value "$12.4k"
    Label "Revenue"

  StatCard
    IconBox bg #f59e0b22
      Icon "shopping-cart", ic #f59e0b, is 22
    Value "456"
    Label "Orders"

  StatCard
    IconBox bg #8b5cf622
      Icon "trending-up", ic #8b5cf6, is 22
    Value "+12%"
    Label "Growth"
```

name: User Profile Card
prompt: Erstelle eine User-Profile-Card mit Avatar, Name, Rolle, Bio und Social-Links als Icons
code:
$card.bg: #1a1a1a
$card.rad: 12
$primary.bg: #2563eb
$text.col: #ffffff
$muted.col: #888888

ProfileCard: bg $card, rad $card, pad 24, gap 16, w 320
  AvatarSection: center, gap 12
  InfoSection: center, gap 4
  BioSection: center
  SocialSection: hor, center, gap 16

ProfileCard
  AvatarSection
    Frame w 80, h 80, bg $primary, rad 99, center
      Text "TS", col $text, fs 24, weight bold
  InfoSection
    Text "Toni Steimle", col $text, fs 20, weight semibold
    Text "Senior Designer", col $muted, fs 14
  BioSection
    Text "Passionate about creating beautiful user experiences and design systems.", col $muted, fs 13, text-align center
  SocialSection
    Frame w 40, h 40, bg #252525, rad 8, center, cursor pointer
      hover:
        bg #333
      Icon "twitter", ic $muted, is 20
    Frame w 40, h 40, bg #252525, rad 8, center, cursor pointer
      hover:
        bg #333
      Icon "linkedin", ic $muted, is 20
    Frame w 40, h 40, bg #252525, rad 8, center, cursor pointer
      hover:
        bg #333
      Icon "github", ic $muted, is 20
    Frame w 40, h 40, bg #252525, rad 8, center, cursor pointer
      hover:
        bg #333
      Icon "mail", ic $muted, is 20
raw_output:
